sn35.135:1.1: “It’s a gain for you, monks, a great gain,
sn35.135:1.2: that you’ve gained the opportunity to live the holy life.
sn35.135:1.3: I have seen a hell named ‘Six Media of Contact.’
sn35.135:1.4: Whatever form one sees there with the eye is undesirable, never desirable; displeasing, never pleasing; disagreeable, never agreeable.
sn35.135:1.5: Whatever sound one hears there with the ear…
sn35.135:1.6: Whatever aroma one smells there with the nose…
sn35.135:1.7: Whatever flavor one tastes there with the tongue…
sn35.135:1.8: Whatever tactile sensation one touches there with the body…
sn35.135:1.9: Whatever idea one cognizes there with the intellect is undesirable, never desirable; displeasing, never pleasing; disagreeable, never agreeable.
sn35.135:1.10: “It’s a gain for you, monks, a great gain,
sn35.135:1.11: that you’ve gained the opportunity to live the holy life.
sn35.135:1.12: I have seen a heaven named ‘Six Media of Contact.’
sn35.135:1.13: Whatever form one sees there with the eye is desirable, never undesirable; pleasing, never displeasing; agreeable, never disagreeable. Whatever sound one hears there with the ear… Whatever aroma one smells there with the nose…
sn35.135:1.14: Whatever flavor one tastes there with the tongue… Whatever tactile sensation one touches there with the body…
sn35.135:1.15: Whatever idea one cognizes there with the intellect is desirable, never undesirable; pleasing, never displeasing; agreeable, never disagreeable.
sn35.135:1.16: “It’s a gain for you, monks, a great gain,
sn35.135:1.17: that you’ve gained the opportunity to live the holy life.”
